_publications._publicationTitle: Expanding the Noonan spectrum/RASopathy NGS panel: Benefits of adding NF1 and SPRED1.

_contextSnippet: Adding the NF1 and SPRED1 genes to Noonan spectrum disorder/RASopathy NGS gene panels modestly increases clinical diagnoses without significantly increasing the VUS burden.
details: Modestly increases clinical diagnoses without significantly increasing the VUS burden when NF1 and SPRED1 are added
